Notices & Circulars

Stay informed with the latest announcements and important communications.

IMPORTANT March 20, 2026

Water Supply Interruption Notice

Due to scheduled maintenance work, water supply will be interrupted from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM on March 25, 2026. Please store adequate water for the mentioned period.

Download
GENERAL March 15, 2026

Annual General Meeting Notice

The Annual General Meeting of Urban Trilla Apartment Owners Mutually Aided Cooperative Maintenance Society Limited will be held on March 30, 2026 at 10:00 AM in the community hall.

Download
MAINTENANCE March 10, 2026

Elevator Maintenance Schedule

Routine maintenance of building elevators will be conducted on March 18, 2026 from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Elevators may be out of service during this period.

Download
EVENTS March 5, 2026

Spring Festival Registration Open

Registration for the annual Spring Festival is now open. The event will feature cultural programs, games, and community dining on March 28, 2026.

Download
FINANCIAL February 28, 2026

Maintenance Fee Payment Reminder

This is a reminder that maintenance fees for March 2026 are due by March 10, 2026. Please ensure timely payment to avoid any inconvenience.

Download
